name: SCI Engineered Materials, Inc.
summary: SCI Engineered Materials, Inc. is an Ohio-based manufacturer and global supplier of advanced materials for Physical Vapor Deposition (PVD) thin film applications. Founded in 1987, the company produces ceramic and metal sputtering targets, evaporation sources, rotatable targets, and specialty powders. It serves aerospace, automotive, defense, glass, optical coatings, and solar markets, generating $19.6 million in revenue for fiscal year 2025, with its largest customer representing approximately 66% of total revenue.

products.name: Ceramic Sputtering Targets
products.description: Ceramic targets produced via sintering, cold isostatic pressing, and hot pressing for PVD applications.

products.name: Metal Sputtering Targets
products.description: Metal and metal alloy targets produced by casting, hot pressing, and machining for decorative and electronic applications.

products.name: Rotatable Sputtering Targets
products.description: Rotatable targets using patented bonding process for roll-to-roll PVD coating industry applications.

products.name: Indium Tin Oxide (ITO) Products
products.description: Electrically conductive ITO targets for architectural glass, automotive, defense, display, and solar markets.

products.name: Zinc Tin Oxide Products
products.description: Conductive targets for architectural glass, automotive, defense, display, and solar markets.

products.name: Enriched Boron Carbide
products.description: High-temperature material for aerospace, nuclear, and defense applications.

products.name: Spherical Powders
products.description: Custom powders for additive manufacturing, powder metallurgy, and advanced manufacturing processes.

products.name: Near Infrared Doped Phosphors
products.description: Short-wave infrared phosphors for nighttime identification needs of defense personnel and first responders.

products.name: Toll Manufacturing Services
products.description: Custom production services including diffusion bonding, indium bonding, powder processing, and vacuum hot pressing.

partnerships.description: Collaboration with end users and OEMs to develop customized PVD material solutions.
